since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +6.67%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.21% · Gold +1.80% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +6.67%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +6.67%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.53%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +10.14%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +10.14%, PUBM +9.82%, SNOW +8.85%, WDAY +8.74%, DDOG +8.52%. Laggards: NXPI -8.08%, TER -8.07%, QCOM -7.58%, MU -6.96%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.46% at $152.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.46% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: DV moving on no clear catalyst
cards.body: DV is +8.64% with no fresh headline this cycle — attention without a story. Volume, not news, is doing the work.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
